chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Etiquettes of the Fasting Person, What Invalidates the Fast, and What Does Not Invalidate it

text:
: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلرَّجُلُ يَجْعَلُ اَلنَّوَاةَ فِي فِيهِ وَ هُوَ صَائِمٌ قَالَ «لاَ» قُلْتُ فَيَجْعَلُ اَلْخَاتَمَ قَالَ «نَعَمْ».
ومن احتلم بالنهار في شهر رمضان فليتم صيامه ولا قضاء عليه.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1870 - It was narrated from Mansur ibn Hazim that he said:
"I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a man who places a date seed in his mouth while fasting.
Imam (as) said: 'No.'
I then asked: 'What about placing a ring?'
Imam (as) said: 'Yes.'"
